description:
Issue Summary:
Device health status is not updating correctly.
Environment:
Test
Steps:
Refresh device health.
Verify current status.
Expected Result:
Health status should refresh successfully.
Actual Result:
Status remained unchanged.
Purpose:
Created for Jira workflow testing.
